final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration featuring traditional 中国少数民族服饰 as a full annotated reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering style are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout: top band (主标题 + 副标题 + 导语), left zone (结构拆解区 with 中文引线标注 and close-up details), upper-right zone (材质 / 工艺 / 质感区 with texture swatches and captions), mid-right zone (纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区 with 主色板, pattern samples, and cultural annotations), bottom band (穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结)
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实人物全身站姿) wearing a complete, historically accurate 中国少数民族 costume as the central subject — choose the most representative and visually rich ethnic group and garment system autonomously; all structural components, key parts, material zones, and pattern regions must be clearly delineated for annotation
Scene/backdrop: must be a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, evoking archival museum display boards
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, scholarly, archival atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, high-quality palette anchored by the costume's authentic colors against the warm paper background — exact color ratios and accent choices are yours
Materials/textures: must include realistic texture swatches (真实纹理小样) for each major fabric / embroidery / weave type shown in the costume, with material labels; overall surface treatment should feel like printed museum collateral — exact paper grain and ink quality are yours
Text (verbatim): must include the following Chinese text blocks rendered clearly and legibly in simplified Chinese (简体中文), no romanization, no English, no garbled characters:
  - 顶部主标题区：自动生成适合所选民族服饰的主标题、副标题与导语（简体中文）
  - 左侧结构拆解区：各关键部件的中文引线标注（如领、袖、襟、腰带、绣片等，按实际服饰结构自动判断）
  - 右上材质区：各材质 / 工艺名称及简短说明（简体中文）
  - 右中纹样色彩区：主色板色名、纹样名称及文化寓意说明（简体中文）
  - 底部：穿着顺序步骤标注 + 核心特征总结文字（简体中文）
Constraints: must preserve authentic ethnic garment structure and historical accuracy; all annotations must connect to correct structural regions via clear leader lines; text must be legible, well-spaced, and typographically consistent with museum publication standards; no decorative text effects that compromise readability
Avoid: poster aesthetic, 影楼 / 电商 / 动漫 / cosplay感, over-decoration, misaligned annotations, incorrect garment structure, blurry or garbled text, fake or generic textures, English text, pinyin, excessive visual noise
